narrative.summary: The Broken Seal is a currently operating Squamish-area restaurant with strong local demand and a casual destination vibe.

blocks.title: Arrival
blocks.body: Address: 38038 Loggers Ln, Squamish, BC V8B 0V7, Canada.

blocks.title: Room
blocks.body: Expect a lively local crowd with mountain-town energy.

blocks.title: Food & Drinks
blocks.body: See photo gallery sections for food, drinks, and atmosphere references.

blocks.title: The Vibe
blocks.body:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Such a cozy little gem in Squamish! The atmosphere is warm and welcoming, and the level of food is truly impressive — rare to find around Vancouver. Our waitress was amazing, very attentive, and explained each dish in detail. Tartars were absolutely incredible! Definitely a place I’ll be coming back to."

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "This spot is great vibes all around. The folks are wonderfully engaging, ambiance and view lifts the mood, even the washroom wallpaper charms.  The food? Absolute delight, great flavors, good portions, awesome pricing, and just the right amount of healthy.  This place claims fave neighborhood resto status for me.  Menu items change seasonally, keeps things fresh! But the tacos is a sacred constant.  Try it to know why."

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Such a cool spot to come on a date night! I love that I could find desserts that I could actually eat with no dairy and no gluten! The drinks were very fun and tasty! Also our waitress was friendly and attentive ☺️"
